nasb.text: ‘Now when anyone presents a grain offering as an offering to the Lord, his offering shall be of fine flour, and he shall pour oil on it and put frankincense on it.

esv.text: “When anyone brings a grain offering as an offering to the Lord, his offering shall be of fine flour. He shall pour oil on it and put frankincense on it

cnv.text: “如果有人獻素祭為供物給耶和華，他的供物要用細麵；他要澆上油，加上乳香，

ccb.text: “如果有人献素祭给耶和华，要用细面粉作祭物。要在细面粉上浇油、加乳香，
